questions.question: How much does video production cost in Jacksonville?
questions.answer: Video production in Jacksonville typically runs from $1,200 to $9,500+ depending on scope. Event photo starts at $1,200, a video day at $2,500, and full photo-and-video event coverage at $5,500. We provide detailed quotes after understanding your goals.

questions.question: Do you travel to Jacksonville for video projects?
questions.answer: Yes, we're based in St. Augustine — just 40 minutes south of Jacksonville. We regularly work with Jacksonville businesses, nonprofits, and venues. No travel fees for projects within the Jacksonville metro area.

questions.question: What types of video production do you offer in Jacksonville?
questions.answer: We offer corporate video, event coverage, brand story videos, social media content, and commercial photography. Our clients in Jacksonville include businesses, nonprofits, government agencies, and cultural organizations.

questions.question: How long does a video project take from start to finish?
questions.answer: Most projects take 3-6 weeks from kickoff to final delivery. This includes strategy, pre-production, filming, and editing. Event coverage and quick-turnaround projects can be delivered faster when needed.

questions.question: Can you handle large corporate events in Jacksonville?
questions.answer: Yes, we have experience with multi-day conferences, corporate galas, and large-scale events. We can provide multi-camera coverage, live streaming, and same-day social media content delivery.
